metaTags.title: Two-Way eCommerce Integrations
metaTags.description: Reliable two-way integrations so you can manage your online orders from a single point-of-sale with ease. Find the e-commerce integration you need here —check more

children.value: We have partnered with the world’s best food ordering companies to offer the highest-quality, most reliable API integrations across delivery apps, POS systems, inventory software, last-mile delivery solutions, and more.
Can't find an integration with a tool you use? Tell us what software you'd like Deliverect to connect with, and we'll explore adding it to our ecosystem.

Our team at Deliverect understands the importance of a smooth integration process with POS Systems for Restaurants and POS Systems for C-stores. That's why we build integrations with the top point-of-sale providers globally, ensuring an effortless setup process for our customers.

We team up with the best global third-party delivery apps, seamlessly consolidating all your channels into one simple system. Say goodbye to delivery headaches and hello to streamlined success with Deliverect.

We integrate with fulfillment partners (Dispatch) worldwide to deliver your online orders and connect the dots between your online sales channels and customers. Do you use a delivery network that isn’t included in the list? Let us know, and we’ll add it to our upcoming integrations.
Simplify online ordering for your restaurant or grocery store with Deliverect.
Our platform seamlessly integrates multiple online ordering systems
, consolidating orders from all channels into one easy-to-manage dashboard.
Upgrade your business ordering system today.

categories.title: On-site ordering
categories.bodyTitle: Kiosk and In-house dining app Integrations

children.value: We partner with in-house dining apps around the world to incorporate them into your POS. Do you use an in-house dining app that isn’t included in the list? Let us know and we’ll add it to our upcoming integrations.

Sell, engage, and grow more with our loyalty integrations for restaurants, ghost kitchens, and C-stores. Deliverect integrates multiple loyalty and marketing solutions, online ordering systems, POS systems, and other solutions into one easy-to-manage platform.

We partner with stock management software around the world to incorporate them into your POS. Do you use stock management software that isn’t included in the list? Let us know and we’ll add it to our upcoming integrations.
We have partnered with the world’s best payment providers to offer the highest-quality, most reliable API integrations across first party online ordering sites, apps, kiosks and more.

Connect AI workflow automation tools and intelligent agents with Deliverect to streamline restaurant operations. Integrate platforms like n8n to automate order management, inventory tracking, and customer communications across your tech stack.
